title: Shadow of the Eagle
writer: Jacques Companéez, Doreen Montgomery, Hagar Wilde
actors: Richard Greene, Valentina Cortese, Greta Gynt
plot: Count Orlof, one of Catherine of Russia's many overnight favourites, travels to Venice on her behalf to abduct Elizabeth Tarakanova who has been laying claim to the throne from the Crimea. Once there, he finds the local charms of ...
